title: vicia fedtschenkoana
intro: Vicia fedtschenkoana, also known as Fedtschenko's vetch or narrow-leaved vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits associated with Vicia fedtschenkoana include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract disorders. Herbal preparations of Vicia fedtschenkoana are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
